channel.title: Signal & Noise
channel.description: Weekly AI-generated analysis at the intersection of media and artificial intelligence. Script written by Claude. Voice by ElevenLabs. Published every Friday.
channel.itunes:author: Signal & Noise

item.title: Ep. 1: The Newsroom That Fired Its Memory
item.description: Three weeks ago, the Philadelphia Inquirer quietly laid off its entire archive research team. Twelve people, most of them with more than a decade at the paper, replaced by an internal retrieval system built on top of a fine-tuned large language model. The system can surface any story from 1829 to ye...
